name: io.moderne.DependencyUsageViolinNuget
description: See the distribution of dependencies by version.

name: io.moderne.CallGraphDataGrid
description: This data grid shows relationships for method calls.

name: io.moderne.FindCallGraph
description: This diagram shows relationships for method calls in UML.

displayName: Class coupling vs cohesion risk matrix
name: io.moderne.CouplingCohesionQuadrant
description: Scatter plot with four quadrants classifying classes by coupling and cohesion. Quadrants: Spaghetti (high coupling, low cohesion), Hub (high coupling, high cohesion), Island (low coupling, low cohesion), Healthy (low coupling, high cohesion). Helps identify classes most in need of refactoring.

name: io.moderne.FindCobolRelationshipsDataGrid
description: Reports the relationships between different COBOL resources. Includes COBOL sources, Copybooks, Link-edit cards, DB2 access, and others.

name: io.moderne.CodeQualityExecutiveDashboard
description: Single-page executive summary combining all quality data tables. Shows portfolio health score, top riskiest repositories, smell severity breakdown, test gap coverage, and worst dependency cycles. Designed for engineering leadership to assess overall codebase health at a glance.

name: io.moderne.CodeQualityDataGrid
description: Interactive sortable data grid showing all quality metrics with hierarchical drill-down from repository to package to class to method. Supports filtering, sorting, and searching across all metric columns. Useful for detailed exploration of quality data beyond what chart visualizations provide.

name: io.moderne.CodeSmellSeverityStackedBar
description: Horizontal stacked bar chart showing code smell counts per repository, segmented by severity (critical, high, medium, low). Reveals which repositories carry the most design problems and how severe they are.

name: io.moderne.CommentLanguageDistribution
description: Show pie graph of the distribution of the language of comments.

name: io.moderne.ComplexityVsTestGapsBubble
description: Bubble chart joining class complexity with test gaps. X-axis shows weighted methods per class (WMC), Y-axis shows untested method count, and bubble size represents a composite risk score. Classes in the upper-right are high-complexity with poor test coverage, representing the highest risk.

name: io.moderne.CompositeRecipeResultsSankey
description: The number of source files affected by each recipe. Recipes can be composed in hierarchical forms. The representation below is a Sankey diagram. \ Reading left to right, the diagram shows the number of source files that cumulatively are changed by all recipes that are connected by successive doNext() chaining. The rightmost recipes are the "leaves" of this operation, i.e. the lowest level operations performed by a composite recipe. \ **The Sankey diagram will be uninteresting for a recipe that isn't a composite.**

name: io.moderne.CyclomaticComplexityHeatmap
description: Displays a heatmap visualization of cyclomatic complexity at the class level across repositories. Each row represents a class, and columns show different complexity metrics (method count, average complexity, max complexity, and total complexity). Color intensity represents normalized complexity values, helping identify the most problematic classes across multiple dimensions.

name: io.moderne.CyclomaticComplexityRiskMatrix
description: Visualizes cyclomatic complexity as a risk matrix to help engineering leaders identify and prioritize areas for refactoring. The scatter plot shows repositories positioned by their number of high-complexity methods (x-axis) and average complexity (y-axis). Bubble size represents the number of classes in each repository. The plot is divided into four quadrants to categorize risk levels.

name: io.moderne.DependencyVulnerabilities
description: Reports the known vulnerabilities and the related dependencies. Here you can see the type of version increases that would be required to fix current vulnerabilities as well as the associated severity distributions. For more information see: - **[Dependency updates unmasked](https://www.moderne.io/blog/security-dependency-updates-unmasked)**

name: io.moderne.DependencyVulnerabilitiesNpm
description: Reports the known vulnerabilities and the related dependencies. Here you can see the type of version increases that would be required to fix current vulnerabilities as well as the associated severity distributions. For more information see: - **[Dependency updates unmasked](https://www.moderne.io/blog/security-dependency-updates-unmasked)**

name: io.moderne.DependencyVulnerabilitiesNuget
description: Reports the known vulnerabilities and the related dependencies. Here you can see the type of version increases that would be required to fix current vulnerabilities as well as the associated severity distributions. name: io.moderne.EffectiveMavenSettings
description: This data grid contains the maven settings file used by each pom.

displayName: End of life exposure executive dashboard
name: io.moderne.EndOfLifeExecutiveDashboard
description: Single-page executive summary of end-of-life (EOL) dependency exposure across the portfolio. Combines the language-specific EOL dependency reports (Java, Node.js, and C#) into one view: how many repositories rely on end-of-life components, which repositories are most exposed, how the exposure is distributed across technologies, and which EOL products are most widespread. Designed for leadership to gauge supportability risk at a glance.

name: io.moderne.ESLintProblems
description: This report shows the reported ESLint problems across projects.

name: io.moderne.ESLintProblemsByRepo
description: This report shows the reported ESLint problems in each repository.

name: io.moderne.FindCobolCopybook
description: This diagram shows which COBOL copybooks are used by which COBOL sources with a directed graph visualization. Missing copybooks are highlighted in red.

name: io.moderne.FindCobolRelationships
description: This diagram shows relationships between different COBOL resources.

displayName: Find uses of method in code
name: io.moderne.FindMethods
description: This report shows the uses of a method across projects.

displayName: Find uses of method in code using AI
name: io.moderne.FindMethodsAI
description: This report shows the method patterns that could be relevant based on the provided query. You can use org.openrewrite.java.search.FindMethods next with any of the following method patterns.

name: io.moderne.FindMethodsAIYAML
description: By following this recipe, you can utilize method patterns relevant to the provided query. Simply import the YAML recipe with the specified method patterns and use a series of org.openrewrite.java.search.FindMethods.

name: io.moderne.GitHubSecretsInUse
description: Unique list of GitHub action secrets used in workflows. Expand the secret row to see a list of repositories using that secret.

name: io.moderne.GradleWrappers
description: Reports the distribution of Gradle wrapper versions in use.

name: io.moderne.DependencyUsageViolinJackson

name: io.moderne.JavaVersionsBySourceSet
description: This report shows the distribution of Java versions by source set.

name: io.moderne.JavaVersionsInUse
description: This report shows the distribution of Java versions in use.

name: io.moderne.LanguageComposition
description: This report shows the different languages that are used in the projects.

name: io.moderne.LanguageCompositionByFolder
description: This report shows the different languages that are used in the projects, organized by the folders containing the source files.

name: io.moderne.LanguageCompositionByRepo
description: This report shows the different languages that are used in each repository.

displayName: LST model types of matching source files.
name: io.moderne.SourceFileModelTypes
description: Identifies which parser was used to parse matching source files.

name: io.moderne.MavenParentPOMs
description: This report shows the different Maven parent POMs that are used in the projects.

name: io.moderne.MethodRiskRadar
description: Radar chart overlaying the top riskiest methods across five quality dimensions. Each axis represents a normalized metric (cyclomatic complexity, cognitive complexity, line count, Halstead difficulty, parameter count). Methods with large, irregular shapes indicate multi-dimensional risk.

name: io.moderne.DependencyCycleNetwork
description: Interactive network graph showing packages involved in dependency cycles. Nodes represent packages and edges represent dependencies forming cycles. Hover over a node to highlight all packages in the same cycle. Useful for identifying and breaking circular dependencies.

name: io.moderne.ArchitecturalStabilityScatter
description: Martin's Main Sequence diagram plotting packages by instability and abstractness. Shows Zone of Pain (high stability, low abstractness) and Zone of Uselessness (low stability, high abstractness). Helps identify packages that violate the Stable Abstractions Principle.

name: io.moderne.Recommendations
description: Parse each recommendation and collect which recipes are more likely to do the recommendations.

displayName: Plugin versions used to build LSTs
name: io.moderne.LstProvenance
description: The Moderne Gradle and Maven plugins used to build the LSTs.

name: io.moderne.PortfolioHealthSunburst
description: Hierarchical sunburst showing code health across the portfolio. Drill from repository to package to class. Color represents maintainability (green = healthy, red = needs attention). Size represents code volume.

name: io.moderne.PortfolioQualityComparisonViolin
description: Violin plots showing the distribution of a selected quality metric across all repositories in the portfolio. Each violin represents one repository, revealing the shape and spread of the metric distribution. Useful for comparing code quality consistency across the organization.

name: io.moderne.RecipePerformance
description: Display the top N recipes by edit time or scan time.

name: io.moderne.ReleaseMetroMap
description: Interactive network graph showing inter-repository dependencies within a release train. Nodes represent repositories and edges show dependency and parent relationships. Helps visualize the dependency structure to plan coordinated multi-repository releases.

name: io.moderne.ReleaseMetroPlan
description: Combined dependency diagram and release plan. Repositories are arranged in wave columns from left to right, with directed edges showing dependency flow. Visualizes both the dependency complexity and the sequential release order in a single view.

name: io.moderne.ReleaseMetroWaves
description: Computes release waves via topological sort of inter-repository dependencies. Wave 0 contains repositories with no internal dependencies that can release first. Each subsequent wave depends only on earlier waves, enabling parallel releases within a wave.

name: io.moderne.RepositoryReleaseOrder
description: This report analyzes inter-repository dependencies to suggest an optimal release order for a release train, helping coordinate multi-repository releases.

name: io.moderne.SpringComponentRelationships
description: This diagram shows relationships between different Spring components.

name: io.moderne.SpringComponentRelationshipsDataGrid
description: Explore dependency relationships of Spring components.

name: io.moderne.SpringComponentsDataGrid
description: Find locations where Spring components are used.

name: io.moderne.SqlCrud
description: Reports SQL operation usage. It is a good way to understand the SQL usage patterns and identify call sites.

name: io.moderne.TechnicalDebtTreemap
description: Treemap of methods sized by code volume and colored by composite debt score. Hierarchy drills from repository to class to method. The largest, reddest blocks represent the highest-return refactoring targets.

displayName: Test coverage gaps by risk and repository
name: io.moderne.TestGapRiskHeatmap
description: Heatmap showing untested method counts per repository, bucketed by risk score. Color intensity reflects the count in each bucket. Quickly identifies which repositories carry the most untested high-risk code.

name: io.moderne.TestQualityExecutiveDashboard
description: Multi-panel dashboard summarizing test quality issues across the portfolio. Includes worst repositories, severity distribution, issue type breakdown, and top fix priorities.

name: io.moderne.TestQualityTreemap
description: Treemap showing test quality issues organized by repository, class, and issue type. Size reflects issue count and color reflects worst severity. Quickly identifies hotspots of test quality problems.

name: io.moderne.TestQualityByLanguage
description: Grouped bar chart showing test quality issue counts by issue type and programming language. Reveals which languages have the most issues in each category.

displayName: Test quality issues by repository and type
name: io.moderne.TestQualityIssueHeatmap
description: Heatmap showing test quality issue counts per repository, bucketed by issue type. Color intensity reflects the count in each bucket. Quickly identifies which repositories carry the most test quality issues by category.

name: io.moderne.TestQualityLanguageSunburst
description: Sunburst chart showing test quality issues organized by language, severity, and issue type. Inner ring shows languages, middle ring shows severity levels, and outer ring shows specific issue types.

name: io.moderne.TestQualityRiskMatrix
description: Bubble chart showing the distribution of test quality issues by issue type and severity. Bubble size reflects the count of issues in each combination. Quickly identifies which issue types are most prevalent at each severity level.

name: io.moderne.TextMatchesTreeGrid
description: Unique list of GitHub action secrets used in workflows. Expand the secret row to see a list of repositories using that secret.

displayName: Top 10 parse failures grouped by stacktraces
name: io.moderne.ParseFailureStacktraces
description: This report shows the parse failure stacktraces analysis by parsers and counts.

name: io.moderne.UI5LintRuleTreemap
description: Treemap of UI5 lint violations by rules.

name: io.moderne.UI5LintViolationsHeatmap
description: Heatmap of UI5 lint violations by repository.
